_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Sabre SynXis
listings.description: Sabre SynXis is a leading central reservation system used by hotel chains and independent properties to manage rates, inventory, and distribution across a wide network of channels. It provides a single point of control for pricing and availability pushed to GDS, OTAs, and direct channels.

listings.name: Amadeus Central Reservation System
listings.description: Amadeus offers a hospitality central reservation system that lets hotel groups manage inventory, rates, and distribution across GDS and online channels from a single platform. It is tightly integrated with the broader Amadeus travel technology ecosystem serving airlines and agencies.
usps: Integrated with Amadeus global travel network

listings.name: iHotelier (Amadeus TravelClick)
listings.description: iHotelier is the central reservation and booking engine platform originally built by TravelClick and now part of Amadeus Hospitality, widely used by independent hotels and small chains in North America. It focuses on direct booking conversion alongside GDS/OTA distribution.
usps: Strong North American independent hotel base

listings.name: Pegasus (Amadeus)
listings.description: Pegasus is a hospitality distribution and CRS technology provider, now part of Amadeus, historically known for its GDS switching and connectivity services linking hotels to global distribution systems. It supports rate and availability messaging between property systems and distribution channels.
usps: Pioneer of hotel GDS switching technology

listings.name: Oracle Hospitality OPERA CRS
listings.description: Oracle's OPERA Central Reservation System enables multi-property hotel groups to manage shared inventory, rates, and reservations across brands from a single cloud platform. It connects natively with OPERA Cloud PMS and Oracle's broader hospitality suite.
usps: Seamless integration with OPERA Cloud PMS

listings.name: SHR Windsurfer CRS
listings.description: SHR (Sceptre Hospitality Resources) provides the Windsurfer central reservation system used by independent luxury hotels and boutique chains to manage distribution and direct bookings. It emphasizes personalized guest data and revenue management for upscale properties.
usps: Includes voice reservation call center services

listings.name: RezGain
listings.description: RezGain is a central reservation and channel distribution platform serving independent hotels and small groups, providing rate and inventory synchronization across OTAs and GDS. It positions itself as a cost-effective CRS alternative for smaller operators.

listings.name: Infor Hospitality CRS
listings.description: Infor provides hospitality management software including central reservation and property management modules aimed at hotel chains and casino resorts. Its CRS integrates with Infor's broader enterprise resource planning suite for cross-property analytics.
usps: Backed by Infor's enterprise ERP ecosystem

listings.name: IDS Next
listings.description: IDS Next is a hospitality technology provider offering property management and central reservation solutions widely used across hotels in India, the Middle East, and Africa. Its FortuneNEXT suite covers front office, reservations, and back-office finance.
usps: Strong presence in India & Middle East

listings.name: Nor1
listings.description: Nor1 provides merchandising and upsell technology that plugs into hotel central reservation and property management systems, enabling automated room upgrade and upsell offers at booking and check-in. It integrates with major CRS/PMS platforms including OPERA and Sabre SynXis.
usps: Deep integrations with leading CRS platforms

listings.name: Newmarket / Delphi (Oracle Hospitality)
listings.description: Delphi (originally Newmarket International, now part of Oracle Hospitality) is a sales and catering CRS-adjacent platform used by hotel groups to manage group, meeting, and event bookings alongside reservation inventory. It is widely deployed in convention and full-service hotels.

listings.name: Windsurfer CRS (Legacy Standalone)
listings.description: Windsurfer CRS is a long-standing central reservation platform historically used by independent and boutique hotel groups for multi-channel rate and inventory distribution. It has been through several ownership changes and remains in use among legacy independent hotel clients.

listings.name: STR/CoStar Hospitality Analytics
listings.description: STR, now part of CoStar Group, provides benchmarking and market data feeding into hotel revenue and reservation strategy, working alongside CRS platforms to inform rate positioning. Its data is a standard reference for hotel performance analytics globally.

listings.name: iDAS Solutions
listings.description: iDAS Solutions offers central reservation and OTA/GDS distribution connectivity for hotel groups, focusing on integrating disparate legacy PMS systems into modern distribution channels. It serves multi-brand hotel groups needing standardized connectivity middleware.
usps: Bridges legacy PMS to modern channels

listings.name: D-EDGE CRS
listings.description: D-EDGE, an Accor-founded hospitality technology company, offers a central reservation system alongside its channel manager and booking engine products, serving independent and chain hotels mainly in Europe. It focuses on unifying distribution data with marketing tools.

listings.name: RateGain DHISCO Connectivity
listings.description: RateGain's DHISCO connectivity hub links hotel central reservation systems to global distribution systems and travel agencies, providing standardized messaging for rates and availability. It supports hotel groups seeking broad GDS reach without building direct connections.

listings.name: GuestCentric CRS
listings.description: GuestCentric provides a cloud-based central reservation system, booking engine, and digital marketing platform for independent hotels and small chains, with a strong presence in Europe and North America. It focuses on direct booking conversion and CMS-integrated websites.
usps: Combines CRS with website & marketing tools
